啲藍💩廢老成日話我哋勾結外國勢力，我哋就勾結比佢睇吓如果上面啲跨國大企業全部唔落TVB，唔知佢下年廣告收入條數會跌幾多呢？我地收到風TVB宜家個cashflow已經收收地皮，部門claim多過十萬嘅通通彈回頭，千祈唔好襯宜家往死裡打呀！

我地fb、tg呢個月內俾TVB搞咗成3、4次，如果話我哋行動對TVB無影響你信唔信？一路唱淡嗰啲係咩人大家心中有數啦！We can do this！巴絲們我地就嚟打勝仗㗎啦！就差你咋！

replies.msg:
其實
我認為唔好靠嚇
但係實際地提出唔好落TVB廣告既理由
例如

TVB is a Pro-Beijing company and it's widely despised by the younger generation and scholars. During the political turmoil in Hong Kong in recent months, there are waves of boycott activity across Hong Kong targeting Pro-Beijing companies for their support towards the infamous Hong Kong Police Force. Advertising via TVB could spread a message, signify that the company supports suppression of freedom and human rights, and may bring adverse results to your company's product and the brand image itself. We urge the marketing team to think twice about the decision to advertise your product on TVB.

會唔會柔性少少，冇咁靠嚇？
先推
